titleZh: 中国收购防御中的董事勤勉义务与商业判断规则
titleEn: Chinese Takeover Law: Revisiting the Director's Duty of Care Under Takeover Defence and the Business Judgment Rule
abstractZh: 以收购防御场景为切入点，重新评估董事在交易决策中的勤勉义务边界及商业判断规则适用的制度可行性。
abstractEn: Uses takeover defense practice to revisit director care standards and evaluates whether a modified business judgment framework can fit Chinese company dispute control.
